sprints.title: Core — Slack OAuth + Config API
sprints.agent_notes: 20/20 tests passing. All endpoints wired. KMS encryption of accessToken deferred to Sprint 2. Bootstrap conditional on SLACK_CLIENT_ID.

sprints.title: Core — Notification Service + Event Subscribers
sprints.agent_notes: 35/35 tests passing. SlackChatPlatform, formatters, dedup subscriber all wired. incident.service missing in domain — used sourceProvider as proxy. Environment hardcoded to 'production' pending environment tagging feature.

sprints.title: Dashboard — Slack Integration Card UI
sprints.agent_notes: SlackIntegrationSettings component, 4 API route handlers, i18n keys en+pt-BR, integration-card.tsx wired. TypeScript clean. Fixed INVARIANTS.md W1 verify command to work from git root.
